mapper.sql: select ui.password , ui.registration_date , ui.phone_number , ui.user_info_id , ui.username FROM user_info ui
mapper.select: select ui.password , ui.registration_date , ui.phone_number , ui.user_info_id , ui.username ,avatar.resource_id as avatar_resource_id ,avatar.resource_name as avatar_resource_name ,avatar.resource_path as avatar_resource_path ,avatar.related_table_name as avatar_related_table_name ,avatar.related_table_key as avatar_related_table_key ,avatar.relate_table_column_name as avatar_relate_table_column_name FROM user_info ui left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='user_info' and relate_table_column_name='avatar') as avatar on avatar.related_table_key=ui.user_info_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select ui.password , ui.registration_date , ui.phone_number , ui.user_info_id , ui.username FROM user_info ui ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select ui.password , ui.registration_date , ui.phone_number , ui.user_info_id , ui.username FROM user_info ui ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select ui.password , ui.registration_date , ui.phone_number , ui.user_info_id , ui.username FROM user_info ui where ui.user_info_id = #{id}
